raw_response:
```python
target_states = set(metadata.get("target_states", ["101", "110"]))
assert target_states == {"101", "110"}

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total > 0

target_count = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in target_states)
non_target_count = total - target_count

assert target_count / total >= 0.9
assert counts.get("101", 0) > 0
assert counts.get("110", 0) > 0
assert non_target_count / total <= 0.1
```

```python
target_states = set(metadata.get("target_states", ["101", "110"]))
total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts > 0
assert shots == total_counts

target_total = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in target_states)
non_target_total = total_counts - target_total

assert len(target_states) == 2
assert target_total / total_counts >= 0.85
for state in target_states:
    assert counts.get(state, 0) / total_counts >= 0.3
assert non_target_total / total_counts <= 0.15
```

```python
target_states = set(metadata.get("target_states", ["101", "110"]))
observed_states = set(counts.keys())

target_total = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in target_states)
non_target_total = sum(v for k, v in counts.items() if k not in target_states)

assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_diffusion"
assert target_states == {"101", "110"}
assert target_total > 0
assert target_total > non_target_total
assert target_total >= 0.75 * shots

for state in target_states:
    assert counts.get(state, 0) > 0

for state, c in counts.items():
    if state not in target_states:
        assert c <= 0.2 * target_total
```

```python
target_states = set(metadata.get("target_states", ["101", "110"]))
total_shots = shots if shots is not None else sum(counts.values())
target_count = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in target_states)
non_target_count = total_shots - target_count

assert target_states == {"101", "110"}
assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_diffusion"
assert total_shots > 0
assert target_count / total_shots >= 0.75
assert counts.get("101", 0) > 0
assert counts.get("110", 0) > 0
assert non_target_count / total_shots <= 0.25
```

```python
target_states = set(metadata.get("target_states", ["101", "110"]))
observed_states = set(counts.keys())

target_total = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in target_states)
non_target_total = sum(v for k, v in counts.items() if k not in target_states)

assert target_total > non_target_total

assert len(observed_states - target_states) <= 2
```

```python
target_states = set(metadata.get("target_states", ["101", "110"]))
observed_states = set(counts.keys())

target_total = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in target_states)
non_target_total = sum(v for k, v in counts.items() if k not in target_states)

assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_diffusion"
assert target_states == {"101", "110"}
assert target_total > 0
assert target_total >= 0.75 * shots
assert non_target_total <= 0.25 * shots
assert observed_states & target_states == target_states
for state in target_states:
    assert counts.get(state, 0) >= 0.2 * shots
```

```python
    most_likely_states = {state for state, c in counts.items() if c == max_count}
    assert most_likely_states <= target_states
```
